title: Raise Python coverage to 100% with Gherkin-only specs
description: Convert remaining behavior into shared Gherkin specs and implement matching steps so behave covers all Python code. No pytest allowed.
creator: Ryan Alyn Porter

comments.author: Ryan Alyn Porter
comments.text: Starting work: rerun behave after daemon override, fix failing specs, then drive coverage to 100% via shared Gherkin only. Will keep parity with Rust features and steps.

comments.author: Ryan Alyn Porter
comments.text: Moved shared Gherkin location to repo root features/. Updated python/features/specs and rust/features/specs symlinks to ../../features, updated parity tool path, and refreshed AGENTS.md and planning references. Features now run from a single root folder.

comments.author: Ryan Alyn Porter
comments.text: Removed feature symlinks and added shared root features/ with proxy steps loader (features/steps/steps.py) and environment proxy (features/environment.py). Updated behave config and rust cucumber path. Python behave and Rust cucumber both pass; parity tool updated to normalize placeholder quotes.

comments.author: Ryan Alyn Porter
comments.text: Resuming coverage push: run python coverage report for behave run, identify uncovered modules/lines, add shared Gherkin scenarios and steps to cover remaining taskulus code while keeping Rust parity. No commits per instruction; will update task with progress and rerun behave + rust cucumber + parity check.

comments.author: Ryan Alyn Porter
comments.text: Resuming work. Plan: fix remaining Rust cucumber failures (env leakage, timestamp, id generation), re-run rust cucumber, re-run spec parity and python coverage. No commits per instructions.

comments.author: Ryan Alyn Porter
comments.text: Updates: added CLI entrypoint feature + steps, covered daemon entrypoint via run_module and stale socket removal, refactored dependency cycle check to use project_dir. Python coverage now 100%. Rust cucumber passing. Tests run: python tools/check_spec_parity.py, cd python && coverage run --source=taskulus -m behave && coverage report -m, cd rust && cargo test --test cucumber.

comments.author: Ryan Alyn Porter
comments.text: Benchmarks work did not touch python/src/taskulus behavior; previous behave coverage remains 100% and shared Gherkin parity intact.

custom.beads_acceptance_criteria: Coverage report via behave reaches 100% for python/src/taskulus. All specs are shared and identical for Rust and Python.
custom.beads_notes:
Starting work: fix remaining Gherkin parity and failing migration errors; run Python/Rust Gherkin suites and parity checks. No commits per instruction.
Progress: fixed migration malformed-records test data and Rust migration run_case mutability; added Rust project module + made file_io discovery helpers pub(crate); removed Rust comment generic step and added specific comment steps for query scenarios; fixed Rust CLI create title parsing to allow missing title (returns "title is required"); aligned Rust stats invalid-json error message; removed duplicate issue_show description step to avoid ambiguity; aligned workflow lookup step to be parameterized; added Python comment steps for tsk-note/tsk-dup and removed generic comment step; removed Python issue_show description step; aligned Rust/Python parity. Tests: cd python && behave; cd rust && cargo test --test cucumber; python tools/check_spec_parity.py.
